/usr/bin/gcc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libCRAW.so -o libCRAW.so CMakeFiles/CRAW.dir/src/CRAW_Account.c.o CMakeFiles/CRAW.dir/src/CRAW_Links.c.o CMakeFiles/CRAW.dir/src/CRAW_Listing.c.o CMakeFiles/CRAW.dir/src/CRAW_Main.c.o CMakeFiles/CRAW.dir/src/CRAW_Message.c.o CMakeFiles/CRAW.dir/src/CRAW_PRIVATE.c.o CMakeFiles/CRAW.dir/src/CRAW_Subreddit.c.o CMakeFiles/CRAW.dir/src/cJSON.c.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so
